subject: Kikaonde
coverageNote: Form directories exist only where teaching-module source PDFs were ingested. Missing forms must resolve as known-gap, not empty objects.

lesson.title: Nsansawilo: uno naye ke musango umo ulupula bijikila, milanguluko ne bya
topics: kusomba (imagery) kwingijisha mpota nangwa malozhi ne biñambañamba.
Nsansawilo inembewa mu tu bipelu twipi-twipi kabiji kechi mu byepelo ine.
